message:
Fix test infrastructure and add stub modules

- Add @testing-library/jest-dom for extended matchers
- Create vitest.setup.ts with jest-dom configuration
- Add framer-motion mock to avoid animation timing issues in tests
- Fix vitest.config.ts with setupFiles and path alias for mock
- Remove tests for non-existent ReferenceCopyButton component
- Fix collapsible test to wait for exit animations
- Add stub modules for unused brenner-loop and agentMail imports

All 315 tests now pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
